name: Refried Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the pinto beans overnight in water.
2. Drain and rinse the beans until the water runs clear.
3. In a large pot, barely cover the rinsed beans with water and bring to a boil. Simmer for approximately 3 hours or until tender.
4. Remove the beans from heat and mash them using a potato masher until smooth.
5. Add salt to taste, along with chopped garlic, onions, bay leaves, and cumin.
6. Transfer the mashed beans into a deep baking dish.
7. Cover the dish and bake in an oven set to 350°F (175°C) for approximately 1 hour.
This recipe is authentic and will yield refried beans that are flavorful without added fats.
